**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or use case.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.

**Notes**
Check the roadmap in the README first — streaming (M4) and Windows/Linux (M5)
are already planned. New AI providers are especially welcome (one adapter file —
see CONTRIBUTING.md).
